subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hello Bob,

Thanks for reaching out — I’d be happy to explore a partnership conversation.

I’m available for a 30-minute call on 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, or 2026-04-23, any time between 14:00 and 16:00 UTC. If any of those work, feel free to send your preferred slot and I’ll do my best to accommodate.

I’m not able to share internal contact details. For general company information and publicly listed contacts, please refer to the public website.

Best,
Agent
